channel.title: AI Builder's Field Guide — Recently Added
channel.description: A daily-curated wiki of the tools, models, and patterns that AI power-users and builders actually reach for.

item.title: Perplexity Computer
item.description: Perplexity Computer is a multi-model AI system that unifies frontier models to create and execute complex, long-running workflows. — Unlike traditional chatbots or single-task agents, it orchestrates specialized AI models to handle entire projects, providing a comprehensive solution for complex automation.

item.title: Oh-My-Pi (omp)
item.description: A terminal AI code agent, forked from Mario Zechner's Pi, featuring an integrated development toolchain and a code-first workflow. — It enhances AI coding by deeply integrating with Language Server Protocols, debuggers, and shells, addressing common pain points for agents in development environments.

item.title: Codebase Memory MCP
item.description: A high-performance Model Context Protocol (MCP) server designed for indexing codebases into a persistent knowledge graph. — It enables coding agents to quickly query entire codebases as context, significantly improving efficiency and reducing token costs for code-related tasks.

item.title: OpenMontage
item.description: An open-source, agentic video production system that includes pipelines, tools, and agent skills for comprehensive video generation. — It allows AI coding assistants to manage entire video production workflows, offering a more complete solution than typical text-to-video models.

item.title: AgentOps
item.description: AgentOps is an observability platform specifically designed to monitor, evaluate, and debug AI agentic workflows and LLM applications. — It offers specialized tracing and logging for complex agent interactions, providing deeper insights compared to general LLM observability tools.

item.title: LlamaIndex
item.description: LlamaIndex is a data framework for LLM applications, providing tools to ingest, structure, and access private or domain-specific data for context-aware AI agents. — It simplifies the integration of external data with LLMs for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), serving as a foundational framework for many data-aware agent applications.

item.title: LMCache
item.description: LMCache is an open-source inference caching system designed to enhance language model serving efficiency by reducing redundant computations. — It optimizes the cost and latency of running LLMs in production, offering a critical component for scaling AI applications more efficiently than uncached inference.

item.title: Skills (Vercel)
item.description: Skills is an open registry and CLI tool by Vercel for installing and managing capability packages to extend AI agent functionalities. — It standardizes and simplifies the process of adding tools to AI agents, fostering a reusable ecosystem for agent builders and promoting interoperability.
